name: this is fine
content: the way i feel, heal, steal-
my attention from me, it's me,
it's always been me. the-
tension, tensed coil wire, set-
suddenly free. purposeless. lost,
in this frost. crosses-
hang from walls, in these halls, they call-
my name. they tell me to brawl, to fight,
to cry. they tell me that sunday night-
was just a night, with the stars so bright,
when i caught a break. close to that lake,
the sea, the ocean, we just-
had some fun.
fun, smoking gun. stun me-
with that drink, pour it-
down my throat. sore, sore-
is how i feel. numb, dumb,
that was dumb. but i'd do it again-
i'd be an idiot, again, walk down that lane,
i'd feel the pain, like i'm insane,
my brain, my head, my heart dead,
it wasn't to be this way. pray, for all you can,
pray for me to stop-
praying for my phone to ring. for her to ping.
put this ring on my commitment issues.
put my eyes on wet tissues, so i can't tell-
if it's the water or the tears, or my fears,
they're nearing my end. i want to send-
this to her, show her what this really is.
it really isn't, is it? meh.
